confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows instructional content about building DIY FLS trainers rather than actual task performance. No instruments performing any of the 5 FLS tasks are visible.
cannot_determine: Task type - this is an instructional video about trainer construction
Performance metrics - no actual FLS task being performed
Completion time - no task execution visible
Technical proficiency - no surgical technique demonstrated
technique_summary: This is an educational video demonstrating how to build a low-cost FLS trainer, not a performance video of any specific FLS task.
improvement_suggestions: Submit a video showing actual performance of one of the 5 FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture)
